refined_caption: The hospital food tray appears unappetizing, with a tray of food that does not look fresh. A woman is sitting nearby, using her cell phone.
complaint_description: I was disappointed with the food served to me during my hospital stay. The food on my tray looked unappetizing and did not smell fresh. I was expecting a more satisfying meal to help with my recovery.
voice_text: The food here looks really gross, I'm not even sure I want to eat it.
